home.title: Welkam — Buguya nuani.
home.subtitle: Wahn komyooniti-oan Garifuna larnin platform, bil wid di Garifuna Comishan pahn Edyukayshan ahn di Ibagari Fownday-shahn.
home.cta_onboarding: Ah nyoo — show mi weh fi staat

onboarding.title: Welkam — mek wi fain weh yoo deh
onboarding.subtitle: Wahn few kweschan wi help wi shay-p yoo paat. No rong ansa.
onboarding.step1_title: Hoo eena yoo laif speak Garifuna?

step1_options.family_fluent: Wahn famli memba speak ih flooant
step1_options.family_some: Wahn famli memba speak som, moas wid di eldaz
step1_options.community: Peepl eena mi komyooniti speak ih
step1_options.none_yet: Ah di larn fres — no Garifuna rong mi yet

onboarding.step2_title: How komfatabl yoo wid Garifuna rait now?
onboarding.step2_subtitle: Bee onist — lisn ahn speak diffrant ting. Choos weh fit.

step2_options.none: Ah no know no Garifuna yet
step2_options.receptive: Ah ondastan som wen oddaz speak; ah no speak ih moch
step2_options.conversational: Ah ku hav wahn beysik kanvasayshan
step2_options.fluent: Ah speak Garifuna komfatabl; ah waahn reed + rait beta

onboarding.step3_subtitle: Eech Garifuna komyooniti hav ihn oan vayrayshanz — wi wi anor yoorz.
onboarding.step4_heritage_intro: Yoo deh pahn di Heritij paat — wi wi staat wid weh yoo famli aredi gi yoo.
onboarding.step4_novice_intro: Yoo deh pahn di Nuvis paat — step bai step, wi wi bil dis tugeda.
onboarding.step4_l1_intro: Yoo deh pahn di L1-mayntayna paat — schrang oral fowndayshan; wi wi gu deepa eena rid + rait.

lexicon.title: Diksshanri + Larnin Chaats
lexicon.subtitle: [community translation pending — Belize Kriol]
lexicon.elder_gated_note: Som kantent (daans, myoozik, seremoni) need Komishan elda authority.

badges.title: Mi Bajiz
badges.subtitle: Verifaiabl dijital kredenshalz per Open Badges 3.0.
badges.empty: No bajiz yet — komplit wahn lesahn fi ern yoo fos wan.

tutor.title: Sokratik Tutah
tutor.subtitle: Wahn growndid AI tutah weh skafold, nat lekcha.
tutor.session_complete: Seshan komplit — kom bak wen yoo redi.

a11y_panel.title: Akseseebilitee prefranz
a11y_panel.subtitle: Dehn setinz seyv pahn yoo divais. Per WCAG 2.2 AAA + W3C COGA.
a11y_panel.plain_language_desc: Ad sympla-langwij somaree neks tu eech lesahn step.

cultural_protocol.title: Labayayahoun Ibagari — di Fownday-shahn Gaadyaanship
cultural_protocol.principle: Di Garifuna langwij held andah Labayayahoun Ibagari — di Fownday-shahn gaadyaanship. Daata na oand bot kay-erd fa. Eni benefit weh kom out flo bak tu di Garifuna peepl, chroo di Garifuna Comishan pahn Edyukayshan ahn di Ibagari Fownday-shahn. Yoozij gif wid agüriahati — di kinship-ak fa nocha di langwij eena di neks jenarayshan.
